jd_text: About Atos Group Atos Group is a global leader in digital transformation with c. 67,000 employees and annual revenue of c. €10 billion, operating in 61 countries under two brands — Atos for services and Eviden for products. European number one in cybersecurity, cloud and high performance computing, Atos Group is committed to a secure and decarbonized future and provides tailored AI-powered, end-to-end solutions for all industries. Atos Group is the brand under which Atos SE (Societas Europaea) operates. Atos SE is listed on Euronext Paris. The purpose of Atos Group is to help design the future of the information space. Its expertise and services support the development of knowledge, education and research in a multicultural approach and contribute to the development of scientific and technological excellence. Across the world, the Group enables its customers and employees, and members of societies at large to live, work and develop sustainably, in a safe and secure information space. Role Purpose The CTO for the Middle East & Turkey region is responsible for leading the regional technology strategy and owning the end-to-end presales and solutioning function for all Atos portfolios. The role acts as the primary technology advisor to customers and internal teams, ensuring that all solutions are innovative, competitive, and fully aligned with business growth objectives. Key Responsibilities Technology Strategy & Innovation Define and execute the technology vision for the MET region aligned with global CTO strategy. Drive adoption of Cloud, Data, AI/ML, Cybersecurity, and Digital Platforms. Translate regional market trends into relevant offerings and use cases. Presales Lead the regional presales and solution architecture function across all business lines. Own solution development for major bids, RFPs, and digital transformation programs. Ensure quality, feasibility, and competitiveness of all technical proposals. Strengthen partnerships (Azure, AWS, Google, OEMs) to support winning solutions. Client Engagement Serve as a trusted technology advisor to CIO/CTO-level stakeholders. Support key accounts with solution roadmaps, architecture planning, and technology advisory. Represent Atos in CXO engagements, technology councils, and industry forums. Technical Governance & Delivery Assurance Provide architecture governance and technical oversight for large regional programs. Establish and enforce technology standards, patterns, and best practices. Act as final escalation point for critical solution or design issues. People & Capability Development Lead and develop a high-performing team of architects and presales specialists. Build strong technical capability in Cloud, Data, Cyber, AI/ML, and industry domains. Strengthen certification frameworks and engineering excellence in the region. Required Experience 15+ years in senior technology leadership roles (CTO / Chief Architect / Technical Director). Deep expertise in Cloud, Data, Cybersecurity, AI/ML, and modern engineering practices. Strong experience running presales and large-scale solution architecture functions. Proven engagement with senior stakeholders across Public Sector, BFSI, Energy, and Telecom. Strong commercial acumen and ability to influence at C-level. Choose your future. Choose Atos.
